      const actions: string[] = [];\n            if (!cloudSync.isLoggedIn()) {\n                actions.push('Login', 'Enable Cloud Sync');\n            } else if (!cloudSync.isEnabled()) {\n vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n                    t('cloud.notLoggedIn'),\n                    'Login Now',\n                    'Cancel'\n                );\n                if (choice === error.message : String(error);\n                        vscode.window.showErrorMessage(t('cloud.syncFailed') + ': ' + errorMsg);\n                    }\n                }\n            );\n        }\n    );\n\n    // 导出 cloudSync 供 watcher 使用\n    (global as any).__cloudSyncManager = cloudSync;\n\n    context.subscriptions.push(\n        saveCommand, \n        searchCommand, \n        cloudLoginCommand, \n        cloudLogoutCommand, \n        showCloudStatusCommand, \n        cloudSyncCommand,\n        refreshStatusCommand,\n        openSettingsCommand,\n        {\n            dispose: () => {\n                for (const watcher of watchers) {\n                    watcher.stop();\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    );\n    \n    console.log(`LLM Chat History Extension ready (${watchers.length} source(s))`);\n\n    // 验证已存储的 token（启动时静默检查）\n    if (cloudSync.isLoggedIn()) {\n        cloudSync.validateToken(false).then((valid) => {\n            if (!valid) {\n                console.log('Stored token is invalid, cleared');\n                // Token 失效，显示提示\n                vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n                    '⚠️ Your cloud sync session has expired. Please login again.',\n                    'Login Now',\n                    'Later'\n                ).then(selection => {\n                    if (selection === 'Login Now') {\n                        cloudSync.loginWithBrowser('login');\n                    }\n                });\n            }\n        });\n    }\n\n    // 定期检查 token 状态（每小时检查一次）\n    const tokenCheckInterval = setInterval(async () => {\n        if (cloudSync.isLoggedIn()) {\n            const valid = await cloudSync.validateToken(false);\n            if (!valid) {\n                vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n                    '⚠️ Your cloud sync session has expired. Please login again.',\n                    'Login Now',\n                    'Later'\n                ).then(selection => {\n                    if (selection === 'Login Now') {\n                        cloudSync.loginWithBrowser('login');\n                    }\n                });\n            }\n        }\n    }, 60 * 60 * 1000); // 每小时检查一次\n\n    context.subscriptions.push({ dispose: () => clearInterval(tokenCheckInterval) });\n\n    // 检查云同步状态的函数\n    const checkCloudSyncStatus = async () => {\n        if (cloudSync.isEnabled() && !cloudSync.isLoggedIn()) {\n            // 立即打开登录界面\n            console.log('[CloudSync] Enabled but not logged in, opening login dialog...');\n            \n            // 显示模态提示，强制用户注意\n            const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n            const debugMode = config.get<boolean>('cloudSync.debugMode', false);\n            const message = debugMode \n                ? '⚠️ Cloud sync enabled (Debug Mode). You must login to sync your chat history.'\n                : '⚠️ Cloud sync enabled. You must login to sync your chat history.';\n            \n            vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n                message,\n                { modal: false }, // 不阻塞，但更醒目\n                'Login Now',\n                'Disable Cloud Sync'\n            ).then(async selection => {\n                if (selection === 'Login Now') {\n                    // 使用浏览器OAuth流程\n                    await cloudSync.loginWithBrowser('login');\n                } else if (selection === 'Disable Cloud Sync') {\n                    config.update('cloudSync.enabled', false, true);\n                }\n            });\n            \n            // 同时自动触发浏览器登录\n            cloudSync.loginWithBrowser('login');\n        }\n    };\n\n    // 启动时检查\n    checkCloudSyncStatus();\n\n    // 监听配置变化\n    context.subscriptions.push(\n        vscode.workspace.onDidChangeConfiguration(e => {\n            if (e.affectsConfiguration('chatHistory.cloudSync.enabled')) {\n                checkCloudSyncStatus();\n                automationStatusProvider.refresh();\n                // 上报云同步启用/禁用事件\n                const newConfig = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n                const enabled = newConfig.get<boolean>('cloudSync.enabled', false);\n                telemetry.trackEvent(\n                    enabled ? TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_ENABLED : TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_DISABLED\n                );\n            }\n            if (e.affectsConfiguration('chatHistory.autoSave')) {\n                automationStatusProvider.refresh();\n            }\n            if (e.affectsConfiguration('chatHistory.cloudSync')) {\n                automationStatusProvider.refresh();\n            }\n        })\n    );\n\n    // 导出 telemetry 供其他模块使用\n    (global as any).__telemetryManager = telemetry;\n}\n\n/**\n * 扩展停用时调用\n */\nexport async function deactivate() {\n    console.log('LLM Chat History Extension deactivated');\n\n    // 上报插件停用事件并刷新队列\n    try {\n        const telemetry = (global as any).__telemetryManager as TelemetryManager | undefined;\n        if (telemetry) {\n            await telemetry.trackEventImmediately(TelemetryEvents.EXTENSION_DEACTIVATED);\n            await telemetry.dispose();\n        }\n    } catch (error) {\n        console.error('[Telemetry] Failed to send deactivation event:', error);\n    }\n}\n\n/**\n * 获取 Cursor 数据库路径\n */\nfunction getCursorDatabasePath(): string {\n    const platform = process.platform;\n    const homeDir = process.env.HOME || process.env.USERPROFILE || '';\n    \n    if (platform === 'win32') {\n        return path.join(\n            homeDir,\n            'AppData/Roaming/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\n        );\n    } else if (platform === 'darwin') {\n        return path.join(\n            homeDir,\n            'Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\n        );\n    } else {\n        // Linux\n        return path.join(\n            homeDir,\n            '.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\n        );\n    }\n}\n\n\n"

       console.log('Kilo storage not found:', kiloStoragePath);\n    }\n    \n    // 如果没有找到任何聊天历史\n    if (watchers.length === 0) {\n        console.warn('No chat history sources found (Cursor, Cline, Codex, Blackbox AI, CodeGeeX, or Kilo)');\n        vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n            'LLM Chat History: No supported AI plugins found. Please install and use Cursor, Cline, GitHub Copilot Chat, Blackbox AI, CodeGeeX, or Kilo.'\n        );\n        return;\n    }\n\n    // 上报插件激活事件\n    telemetry.trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.EXTENSION_ACTIVATED, {\n        watchers_count: watchers.length,\n        cursor_found: fs.existsSync(cursorDbPath),\n        cline_found: fs.existsSync(codegeexStoragePath),\n        kilo_found: fs.existsSync(kiloStoragePath),\n        cloud_sync_enabled: config.get<boolean>('cloudSync.enabled', false),\n        auto_save_enabled: autoSave,\n    });\n    \n    // 注册命令：手动保存\n    const saveCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\n        'chatHistory.saveNow',\n        () => {\n            // 上报手动保存事件\n vscode.window.showInformationMessage(t('info.saved'));\n        }\n    );\n\n    // 注册命令：搜索聊天历史\n    const searchCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\n        'chatHistory.search',\n        () vscode.window.createTreeView('chatHistoryStatus', {\n        treeDataProvider: automationStatusProvider,\n        showCollapseAll: false\n    });\n\n    const accountTreeView = vscode.window.createTreeView('chatHistoryAccount', {\n        treeDataProvider: accountStatusProvider,\n        showCollapseAll: false\n    });\n\n    context.subscriptions.push(automationTreeView, accountTreeView);\n\n    // 导出到全局供其他模块使用\n    (global as any).__automationStatusProvider = automationStatusProvider;\n    (global as any).__accountStatusProvider = accountStatusProvider;\n\n    // 注册命令：云端登录\n    const cloudLoginCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\n        'chatHistory.cloudLogin',\n        async () => {\n            if (cloudSync.isLoggedIn()) {\n                // 已登录，显示选项\n                vscode.window.showQuickPick([\n                    { label: t('cloud.logout'), action: 'logout' },\n                    { label: 'Sync Now', action: 'sync' }\n                ], {\n                    placeHolder: t('cloud.loggedInAs', { username: cloudSync.getUser()?.username || '' })\n                }).then(async (selected) => {\n                    if (selected?.action === 'logout') {\n                        await cloudSync.logout();\n                    } else if (selected?.action === 'sync') {\n                        vscode.commands.executeCommand('chatHistory.cloudSync');\n                    }\n                });\n            } else {\n                // 未登录，显示选择登录或注册\n                const choice = await vscode.window.showQuickPick([\n                    { label: '$(sign-in) Login', description: 'Login to your existing account', action: 'login' },\n                    { label: '$(person-add) Register', description: 'Create a new account', action: 'register' }\n                ], {\n                    placeHolder: 'Login or register to enable cloud sync'\n                });\n\n                if (choice) {\n                    await cloudSync.loginWithBrowser(choice.action as 'login' | 'register');\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    );\n\n    // 注册命令：云端登出\n    const cloudLogoutCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\n        'chatHistory.cloudLogout',\n        async () => {\n            if (cloudSync.isLoggedIn()) {\n                await cloudSync.logout();\n                // 刷新侧边栏\n                automationStatusProvider.refresh();\n                accountStatusProvider.refresh();\n            }\n        }\n    );\n\n    // 注册命令：查看云同步状态\n    const showCloudStatusCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\n        'chatHistory.showCloudStatus',\n        async () => {\n            const statusInfo = cloudSync.getStatusInfo();\n            \n            const actions: string[] = [];\n            if (!cloudSync.isLoggedIn()) {\n                actions.push('Login', 'Enable Cloud Sync');\n            } else if (!cloudSync.isEnabled()) {\n                actions.push('Enable Cloud Sync', 'Logout');\n            } else {\n                actions.push('Sync Now', 'Check Connection', 'Logout');\n            }\n\n            const choice = await vscode.window.showInformationMessage(\n                `${statusInfo.status}\\n\\n${statusInfo.message}\\n\\n${statusInfo.details}`,\n                ...actions\n            );\n\n            if (choice === 'Login') {\n                await cloudSync.loginWithBrowser('login');\n            } else if (choice === 'Enable Cloud Sync') {\n                await vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory').update('cloudSync.enabled', true, true);\n            } else if (choice === 'Sync Now') {\n                vscode.commands.executeCommand('chatHistory.cloudSync');\n            } else if (choice === 'Check Connection') {\n                await cloudSync.validateToken(true);\n            } else if (choice === 'Logout') {\n                await cloudSync.logout();\n            }\n        }\n    );\n\n    // 注册命令：刷新侧边栏状态\n    const refreshStatusCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\n        'chatHistory.refreshStatus',\n        () => {\n            automationStatusProvider.refresh();\n            accountStatusProvider.refresh();\n            vscode.window.showInformationMessage('Status refreshed');\n        }\n    );\n\n    // 注册命令：打开设置\n    const openSettingsCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\n        'chatHistory.openSettings',\n        (settingKey?: string) => {\n            if (settingKey) {\n                vscode.commands.executeCommand('workbench.action.openSettings', settingKey);\n            } else {\n                vscode.commands.executeCommand('workbench.action.openSettings', 'chatHistory');\n            }\n        }\n    );\n\n    // 注册命令：立即同步到云端\n    const cloudSyncCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\n        'chatHistory.cloudSync',\n        async () => {\n            if (!cloudSync.isLoggedIn()) {\n                const choice = await vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n                    t('cloud.notLoggedIn'),\n                    'Login Now',\n                    'Cancel'\n                );\n                if (choice === 'Login Now') {\n                    await cloudSync.loginWithBrowser('login');\n                }\n                return;\n            }\n\n            if (!cloudSync.isEnabled()) {\n                const enable = await vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n                    'Cloud sync is not enabled. Enable it now?',\n                    'Enable',\n                    'Cancel'\n                );\n                if (enable === 'Enable') {\n                    await vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory').update('cloudSync.enabled', true, true);\n                } else {\n                    return;\n                }\n            }\n\n            // 上报手动同步事件\n            telemetry.trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.MANUAL_SYNC_TRIGGERED);\n\n            vscode.window.withProgress(\n                {\n                    location: vscode.ProgressLocation.Notification,\n                    title: t('cloud.syncing'),\n                    cancellable: false,\n                },\n                async () => {\n                    try {\n                        // 触发所有 watcher 同步\n                        for (const watcher of watchers) {\n                            watcher.syncNow();\n                        }\n                        vscode.window.showInformationMessage(t('cloud.syncSuccess'));\n                    } catch (error) {\n                        const errorMsg = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n                        vscode.window.showErrorMessage(t('cloud.syncFailed') + ': ' + errorMsg);\n                    }\n                }\n            );\n        }\n    );\n\n    // 导出 cloudSync 供 watcher 使用\n    (global as any).__cloudSyncManager = cloudSync;\n\n    context.subscriptions.push(\n        saveCommand, \n        searchCommand, \n        cloudLoginCommand, \n        cloudLogoutCommand, \n        showCloudStatusCommand, \n        cloudSyncCommand,\n        refreshStatusCommand,\n        openSettingsCommand,\n        {\n            dispose: () => {\n                for (const watcher of watchers) {\n                    watcher.stop();\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    );\n    \n    console.log(`LLM Chat History Extension ready (${watchers.length} source(s))`);\n\n    // 验证已存储的 token（启动时静默检查）\n    if (cloudSync.isLoggedIn()) {\n        cloudSync.validateToken(false).then((valid) => {\n            if (!valid) {\n                console.log('Stored token is invalid, cleared');\n                // Token 失效，显示提示\n                vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n                    '⚠️ Your cloud sync session has expired. Please login again.',\n                    'Login Now',\n                    'Later'\n                ).then(selection => {\n                    if (selection === 'Login Now') {\n                        cloudSync.loginWithBrowser('login');\n                    }\n                });\n            }\n        });\n    }\n\n    // 定期检查 token 状态（每小时检查一次）\n    const tokenCheckInterval = setInterval(async () => {\n        if (cloudSync.isLoggedIn()) {\n            const valid = await cloudSync.validateToken(false);\n            if (!valid) {\n                vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n                    '⚠️ Your cloud sync session has expired. Please login again.',\n                    'Login Now',\n                    'Later'\n                ).then(selection => {\n                    if (selection === 'Login Now') {\n                        cloudSync.loginWithBrowser('login');\n                    }\n                });\n            }\n        }\n    }, 60 * 60 * 1000); // 每小时检查一次\n\n    context.subscriptions.push({ dispose: () => clearInterval(tokenCheckInterval) });\n\n    // 检查云同步状态的函数\n    const checkCloudSyncStatus = async () => {\n        if (cloudSync.isEnabled() && !cloudSync.isLoggedIn()) {\n            // 立即打开登录界面\n            console.log('[CloudSync] Enabled but not logged in, opening login dialog...');\n            \n            // 显示模态提示，强制用户注意\n            const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n            const debugMode = config.get<boolean>('cloudSync.debugMode', false);\n            const message = debugMode \n                ? '⚠️ Cloud sync enabled (Debug Mode). You must login to sync your chat history.'\n                : '⚠️ Cloud sync enabled. You must login to sync your chat history.';\n            \n            vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n                message,\n                { modal: false }, // 不阻塞，但更醒目\n                'Login Now',\n                'Disable Cloud Sync'\n            ).then(async selection => {\n                if (selection === 'Login Now') {\n                    // 使用浏览器OAuth流程\n                    await cloudSync.loginWithBrowser('login');\n                } else if (selection === 'Disable Cloud Sync') {\n                    config.update('cloudSync.enabled', false, true);\n                }\n            });\n            \n            // 同时自动触发浏览器登录\n            cloudSync.loginWithBrowser('login');\n        }\n    };\n\n    // 启动时检查\n    checkCloudSyncStatus();\n\n    // 监听配置变化\n    context.subscriptions.push(\n        vscode.workspace.onDidChangeConfiguration(e => {\n            if (e.affectsConfiguration('chatHistory.cloudSync.enabled')) {\n                checkCloudSyncStatus();\n                automationStatusProvider.refresh();\n                // 上报云同步启用/禁用事件\n                const newConfig = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n                const enabled = newConfig.get<boolean>('cloudSync.enabled', false);\n                telemetry.trackEvent(\n                    enabled ? TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_ENABLED : TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_DISABLED\n                );\n            }\n            if (e.affectsConfiguration('chatHistory.autoSave')) {\n                automationStatusProvider.refresh();\n            }\n            if (e.affectsConfiguration('chatHistory.cloudSync')) {\n                automationStatusProvider.refresh();\n            }\n        })\n    );\n\n    // 导出 telemetry 供其他模块使用\n    (global as any).__telemetryManager = telemetry;\n}\n\n/**\n * 扩展停用时调用\n */\nexport async function deactivate() {\n    console.log('LLM Chat History Extension deactivated');\n\n    // 上报插件停用事件并刷新队列\n    try {\n        const telemetry = (global as any).__telemetryManager as TelemetryManager | undefined;\n        if (telemetry) {\n            await telemetry.trackEventImmediately(TelemetryEvents.EXTENSION_DEACTIVATED);\n            await telemetry.dispose();\n        }\n    } catch (error) {\n        console.error('[Telemetry] Failed to send deactivation event:', error);\n    }\n}\n\n/**\n * 获取 Cursor 数据库路径\n */\nfunction getCursorDatabasePath(): string {\n    const platform = process.platform;\n    const homeDir = process.env.HOME || process.env.USERPROFILE || '';\n    \n    if (platform === 'win32') {\n        return path.join(\n            homeDir,\n            'AppData/Roaming/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\n        );\n    } else if (platform === 'darwin') {\n        return path.join(\n            homeDir,\n            'Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\n        );\n    } else {\n        // Linux\n        return path.join(\n            homeDir,\n            '.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\n        );\n    }\n}\n\n\n"
}

], {\n                    placeHolder: t('cloud.loggedInAs', { username: cloudSync.getUser()?.username || '' })\n                }).then(async (selected) => {\n                    if (selected?.action      if (choice) {\n                    await cloudSync.loginWithBrowser(choice.action as 'login' | 'register');\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    );\n\n    // 注册命令：云端登出\n    const cloudLogoutCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\n        'chatHistory.cloudLogout',\n        async () => {\n            if (cloudSync.isLoggedIn()) {\n                await cloudSync.logout();\n showCloudStatusCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\n        'chatHistory.showCloudStatus',\n        async () => {\n            const statusInfo = cloudSync.getStatusInfo();\n            \n            const actions: string[] = [];\n            if (!cloudSync.isLoggedIn()) {\n                actions.push('Login', 'Enable Cloud Sync');\n            } else if (!cloudSync.isEnabled()) {\n                actions.push('Enable Cloud Sync', 'Logout');\n            } else {\n                actions.push('Sync Now', 'Check Connection', 'Logout');\n            }\n\n            const choice = await vscode.window.showInformationMessage(\n                `${statusInfo.status}\\n\\n${statusInfo.message}\\n\\n${statusInfo.details}`,\n                ...actions\n            );\n\n            if (choice === 'Login') {\n                await cloudSync.loginWithBrowser('login');\n            } else if (choice === 'Enable Cloud Sync') {\n                await vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory').update('cloudSync.enabled', true, true);\n            } else if (choice === 'Sync Now') {\n                vscode.commands.executeCommand('chatHistory.cloudSync');\n            } else if (choice === 'Check Connection') {\n                await cloudSync.validateToken(true);\n            } else if (choice === 'Logout') {\n                await cloudSync.logout();\n            }\n        }\n    );\n\n    // 注册命令：刷新侧边栏状态\n    const refreshStatusCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\n        'chatHistory.refreshStatus',\n        () => {\n            automationStatusProvider.refresh();\n            accountStatusProvider.refresh();\n            vscode.window.showInformationMessage('Status refreshed');\n        }\n    );\n\n    // 注册命令：打开设置\n    const openSettingsCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\n        'chatHistory.openSettings',\n        (settingKey?: string) => {\n            if (settingKey) {\n                vscode.commands.executeCommand('workbench.action.openSettings', settingKey);\n            } else {\n                vscode.commands.executeCommand('workbench.action.openSettings', 'chatHistory');\n            }\n        }\n    );\n\n    // 注册命令：立即同步到云端\n    const cloudSyncCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\n        'chatHistory.cloudSync',\n        async () => {\n            if (!cloudSync.isLoggedIn()) {\n                const choice = await vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n                    t('cloud.notLoggedIn'),\n                    'Login Now',\n                    'Cancel'\n                );\n                if (choice === const enable = await vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n                    'Cloud sync is not enabled. error.message : String(error);\n                        vscode.window.showErrorMessage(t('cloud.syncFailed') + ': ' + errorMsg);\n                    }\n                }\n            );\n        }\n    );\n\n    // 导出 cloudSync 供 watcher 使用\n    (global as any).__cloudSyncManager = cloudSync;\n\n    context.subscriptions.push(\n        saveCommand, \n        searchCommand, \n        cloudLoginCommand, \n        cloudLogoutCommand, \n        showCloudStatusCommand, \n        cloudSyncCommand,\n        refreshStatusCommand,\n        openSettingsCommand,\n        {\n            dispose: () => {\n                for (const watcher of watchers) {\n                    watcher.stop();\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    );\n    \n    console.log(`LLM Chat History Extension ready (${watchers.length} source(s))`);\n\n    // 验证已存储的 token（启动时静默检查）\n    if (cloudSync.isLoggedIn()) {\n        cloudSync.validateToken(false).then((valid) => {\n            if (!valid) {\n                console.log('Stored token is invalid, cleared');\n                // Token 失效，显示提示\n                vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n                    '⚠️ Your cloud sync session has expired. Please login again.',\n                    'Login Now',\n                    'Later'\n                ).then(selection => {\n                    if (selection === 'Login Now') {\n                        cloudSync.loginWithBrowser('login');\n                    }\n                });\n            }\n        });\n    }\n\n    // 定期检查 token 状态（每小时检查一次）\n    const tokenCheckInterval = setInterval(async () => {\n        if (cloudSync.isLoggedIn()) {\n            const valid = await cloudSync.validateToken(false);\n            if (!valid) {\n                vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n                    '⚠️ Your cloud sync session has expired. Please login again.',\n                    'Login Now',\n                    'Later'\n                ).then(selection => {\n                    if (selection === 'Login Now') {\n                        cloudSync.loginWithBrowser('login');\n                    }\n                });\n            }\n        }\n    }, 60 * 60 * 1000); // 每小时检查一次\n\n    context.subscriptions.push({ dispose: () => clearInterval(tokenCheckInterval) });\n\n    // 检查云同步状态的函数\n    const checkCloudSyncStatus = async () => {\n        if (cloudSync.isEnabled() && !cloudSync.isLoggedIn()) {\n            // 立即打开登录界面\n            console.log('[CloudSync] Enabled but not logged in, opening login dialog...');\n            \n            // 显示模态提示，强制用户注意\n            const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n            const debugMode = config.get<boolean>('cloudSync.debugMode', false);\n            const message = debugMode \n                ? '⚠️ Cloud sync enabled (Debug Mode). You must login to sync your chat history.'\n                : '⚠️ Cloud sync enabled. You must login to sync your chat history.';\n            \n            vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n                message,\n                { modal: false }, // 不阻塞，但更醒目\n                'Login Now',\n                'Disable Cloud Sync'\n            ).then(async selection => {\n                if (selection === 'Login Now') {\n                    // 使用浏览器OAuth流程\n                    await cloudSync.loginWithBrowser('login');\n                } else if (selection === 'Disable Cloud Sync') {\n                    config.update('cloudSync.enabled', false, true);\n                }\n            });\n            \n            // 同时自动触发浏览器登录\n            cloudSync.loginWithBrowser('login');\n        }\n    };\n\n    // 启动时检查\n    checkCloudSyncStatus();\n\n    // 监听配置变化\n    context.subscriptions.push(\n        vscode.workspace.onDidChangeConfiguration(e => {\n            if (e.affectsConfiguration('chatHistory.cloudSync.enabled')) {\n                checkCloudSyncStatus();\n                automationStatusProvider.refresh();\n                // 上报云同步启用/禁用事件\n                const newConfig = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n                const enabled = newConfig.get<boolean>('cloudSync.enabled', false);\n                telemetry.trackEvent(\n                    enabled ? TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_ENABLED : TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_DISABLED\n                );\n            }\n            if (e.affectsConfiguration('chatHistory.autoSave')) {\n                automationStatusProvider.refresh();\n            }\n            if (e.affectsConfiguration('chatHistory.cloudSync')) {\n                automationStatusProvider.refresh();\n            }\n        })\n    );\n\n    // 导出 telemetry 供其他模块使用\n    (global as any).__telemetryManager = telemetry;\n}\n\n/**\n * 扩展停用时调用\n */\nexport async function deactivate() {\n    console.log('LLM Chat History Extension deactivated');\n\n    // 上报插件停用事件并刷新队列\n    try {\n        const telemetry = (global as any).__telemetryManager as TelemetryManager | undefined;\n        if (telemetry) {\n            await telemetry.trackEventImmediately(TelemetryEvents.EXTENSION_DEACTIVATED);\n            await telemetry.dispose();\n        }\n    } catch (error) {\n        console.error('[Telemetry] Failed to send deactivation event:', error);\n    }\n}\n\n/**\n * 获取 Cursor 数据库路径\n */\nfunction getCursorDatabasePath(): string {\n    const platform = process.platform;\n    const homeDir = process.env.HOME || process.env.USERPROFILE || '';\n    \n    if (platform === 'win32') {\n        return path.join(\n            homeDir,\n            'AppData/Roaming/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\n        );\n    } else if (platform === 'darwin') {\n        return path.join(\n            homeDir,\n            'Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\n        );\n    } else {\n        // Linux\n        return path.join(\n            homeDir,\n            '.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\n        );\n    }\n}\n\n\n"

            vscode.commands.executeCommand('chatHistory.cloudSync');\n                    }\n                });\n            } else {\n                // 未登录，显示选择登录或注册\n                const choice = cloudLogoutCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\n        'chatHistory.cloudLogout',\n        async () => {\n            if (cloudSync.isLoggedIn()) {\n                await cloudSync.logout();\n                // 刷新侧边栏\n                automationStatusProvider.refresh();\n                accountStatusProvider.refresh();\n            }\n        }\n    );\n\n    // 注册命令：查看云同步状态\n    const showCloudStatusCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\n        'chatHistory.showCloudStatus',\n        async () => {\n            const statusInfo = cloudSync.getStatusInfo();\n            \n            const actions: string[] = [];\n            if (!cloudSync.isLoggedIn()) {\n                actions.push('Login', 'Enable Cloud Sync');\n            } else if (!cloudSync.isEnabled()) {\n                actions.push('Enable Cloud Sync', 'Logout');\n            } else {\n                actions.push('Sync Now', 'Check Connection', 'Logout');\n            }\n\n            const choice = await vscode.window.showInformationMessage(\n                `${statusInfo.status}\\n\\n${statusInfo.message}\\n\\n${statusInfo.details}`,\n                ...actions\n            );\n\n            if (choice === 'Login') {\n                await cloudSync.loginWithBrowser('login');\n            } else if (choice === 'Enable Cloud Sync') {\n                await vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory').update('cloudSync.enabled', true, true);\n            } else if (choice === 'Sync Now') {\n                vscode.commands.executeCommand('chatHistory.cloudSync');\n            } else if (choice === 'Check Connection') {\n                await cloudSync.validateToken(true);\n            } else if (choice === 'Logout') {\n                await cloudSync.logout();\n            }\n        }\n    );\n\n    // 注册命令：刷新侧边栏状态\n    const refreshStatusCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\n        'chatHistory.refreshStatus',\n        () => {\n            automationStatusProvider.refresh();\n            accountStatusProvider.refresh();\n            vscode.window.showInformationMessage('Status refreshed');\n        }\n    );\n\n    // 注册命令：打开设置\n    const openSettingsCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\n        'chatHistory.openSettings',\n        (settingKey?: string) => {\n            if (settingKey) {\n                vscode.commands.executeCommand('workbench.action.openSettings', settingKey);\n            } else {\n                vscode.commands.executeCommand('workbench.action.openSettings', 'chatHistory');\n            }\n        }\n    );\n\n    // 注册命令：立即同步到云端\n    const cloudSyncCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\n        'chatHistory.cloudSync',\n        async () => {\n            if (!cloudSync.isLoggedIn()) {\n                const choice = await vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n                    t('cloud.notLoggedIn'),\n                    'Login Now',\n                    'Cancel'\n                );\n                if (choice === 'Login Now') {\n                    await cloudSync.loginWithBrowser('login');\n                }\n                return;\n            }\n\n            if (!cloudSync.isEnabled()) {\n                const enable = await vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n                    'Cloud sync is not enabled. Enable it now?',\n                    'Enable',\n                    'Cancel'\n                );\n                if (enable === 'Enable') {\n                    await vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory').update('cloudSync.enabled', true, true);\n                } else {\n                    return;\n                }\n            }\n\n            // 上报手动同步事件\n            telemetry.trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.MANUAL_SYNC_TRIGGERED);\n\n            vscode.window.withProgress(\n                {\n                    location: vscode.ProgressLocation.Notification,\n                    title: t('cloud.syncing'),\n                    cancellable: false,\n                },\n                async () => {\n                    try {\n                        // 触发所有 watcher 同步\n                        for (const watcher of watchers) {\n                            watcher.syncNow();\n                        }\n                        vscode.window.showInformationMessage(t('cloud.syncSuccess'));\n                    } catch (error) {\n                        const errorMsg = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n                        vscode.window.showErrorMessage(t('cloud.syncFailed') + ': ' + errorMsg);\n                    }\n                }\n            );\n        }\n    );\n\n    // 导出 cloudSync 供 watcher 使用\n    (global as any).__cloudSyncManager = cloudSync;\n\n    context.subscriptions.push(\n        saveCommand, \n        searchCommand, \n        cloudLoginCommand, \n        cloudLogoutCommand, \n        showCloudStatusCommand, \n        cloudSyncCommand,\n        refreshStatusCommand,\n        openSettingsCommand,\n        {\n            dispose: () => {\n                for (const watcher of watchers) {\n                    watcher.stop();\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    );\n    \n    console.log(`LLM Chat History Extension ready (${watchers.length} source(s))`);\n\n    // 验证已存储的 token（启动时静默检查）\n    if (cloudSync.isLoggedIn()) {\n        cloudSync.validateToken(false).then((valid) => {\n            if (!valid) {\n                console.log('Stored token is invalid, cleared');\n                // Token 失效，显示提示\n                vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n                    '⚠️ Your cloud sync session has expired. Please login again.',\n                    'Login Now',\n                    'Later'\n                ).then(selection => {\n                    if (selection === 'Login Now') {\n                        cloudSync.loginWithBrowser('login');\n                    }\n                });\n            }\n        });\n    }\n\n    // 定期检查 token 状态（每小时检查一次）\n    const tokenCheckInterval = setInterval(async () => {\n        if (cloudSync.isLoggedIn()) {\n            const valid = await cloudSync.validateToken(false);\n            if (!valid) {\n                vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n                    '⚠️ Your cloud sync session has expired. Please login again.',\n                    'Login Now',\n                    'Later'\n                ).then(selection => {\n                    if (selection === 'Login Now') {\n                        cloudSync.loginWithBrowser('login');\n                    }\n                });\n            }\n        }\n    }, 60 * 60 * 1000); // 每小时检查一次\n\n    context.subscriptions.push({ dispose: () => clearInterval(tokenCheckInterval) });\n\n    // 检查云同步状态的函数\n    const checkCloudSyncStatus = async () => {\n        if (cloudSync.isEnabled() && !cloudSync.isLoggedIn()) {\n            // 立即打开登录界面\n            console.log('[CloudSync] Enabled but not logged in, opening login dialog...');\n            \n            // 显示模态提示，强制用户注意\n            const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n            const debugMode = config.get<boolean>('cloudSync.debugMode', false);\n            const message = debugMode \n                ? '⚠️ Cloud sync enabled (Debug Mode). You must login to sync your chat history.'\n                : '⚠️ Cloud sync enabled. You must login to sync your chat history.';\n            \n            vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n                message,\n                { modal: false }, // 不阻塞，但更醒目\n                'Login Now',\n                'Disable Cloud Sync'\n            ).then(async selection => {\n                if (selection === 'Login Now') {\n                    // 使用浏览器OAuth流程\n                    await cloudSync.loginWithBrowser('login');\n                } else if (selection === 'Disable Cloud Sync') {\n                    config.update('cloudSync.enabled', false, true);\n                }\n            });\n            \n            // 同时自动触发浏览器登录\n            cloudSync.loginWithBrowser('login');\n        }\n    };\n\n    // 启动时检查\n    checkCloudSyncStatus();\n\n    // 监听配置变化\n    context.subscriptions.push(\n        vscode.workspace.onDidChangeConfiguration(e => {\n            if (e.affectsConfiguration('chatHistory.cloudSync.enabled')) {\n                checkCloudSyncStatus();\n                automationStatusProvider.refresh();\n                // 上报云同步启用/禁用事件\n                const newConfig = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n                const enabled = newConfig.get<boolean>('cloudSync.enabled', false);\n                telemetry.trackEvent(\n                    enabled ? TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_ENABLED : TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_DISABLED\n                );\n            }\n            if (e.affectsConfiguration('chatHistory.autoSave')) {\n                automationStatusProvider.refresh();\n            }\n            if (e.affectsConfiguration('chatHistory.cloudSync')) {\n                automationStatusProvider.refresh();\n            }\n        })\n    );\n\n    // 导出 telemetry 供其他模块使用\n    (global as any).__telemetryManager = telemetry;\n}\n\n/**\n * 扩展停用时调用\n */\nexport async function deactivate() {\n    console.log('LLM Chat History Extension deactivated');\n\n    // 上报插件停用事件并刷新队列\n    try {\n        const telemetry = (global as any).__telemetryManager as TelemetryManager | undefined;\n        if (telemetry) {\n            await telemetry.trackEventImmediately(TelemetryEvents.EXTENSION_DEACTIVATED);\n            await telemetry.dispose();\n        }\n    } catch (error) {\n        console.error('[Telemetry] Failed to send deactivation event:', error);\n    }\n}\n\n/**\n * 获取 Cursor 数据库路径\n */\nfunction getCursorDatabasePath(): string {\n    const platform = process.platform;\n    const homeDir = process.env.HOME || process.env.USERPROFILE || '';\n    \n    if (platform === 'win32') {\n        return path.join(\n            homeDir,\n            'AppData/Roaming/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\n        );\n    } else if (platform === 'darwin') {\n        return path.join(\n            homeDir,\n            'Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\n        );\n    } else {\n        // Linux\n        return path.join(\n            homeDir,\n            '.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\n        );\n    }\n}\n\n\n"

error.message : String(error);\n                        vscode.window.showErrorMessage(t('cloud.syncFailed') + ': ' + errorMsg);\n                    }\n                }\n            );\n        }\n    );\n\n    // 导出 cloudSync 供 watcher 使用\n    (global as any).__cloudSyncManager = cloudSync;\n\n    context.subscriptions.push(\n        saveCommand, \n        searchCommand, \n        cloudLoginCommand, \n        cloudLogoutCommand, \n        showCloudStatusCommand, \n        cloudSyncCommand,\n        refreshStatusCommand,\n        openSettingsCommand,\n        {\n            dispose: () => {\n                for (const watcher of watchers) {\n                    watcher.stop();\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    );\n    \n    console.log(`LLM Chat History Extension ready (${watchers.length} source(s))`);\n\n    // 验证已存储的 token（启动时静默检查）\n    if (cloudSync.isLoggedIn()) {\n        cloudSync.validateToken(false).then((valid) => {\n            if (!valid) {\n                console.log('Stored token is invalid, cleared');\n                // Token 失效，显示提示\n                vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n                    '⚠️ Your cloud sync session has expired. Please login again.',\n                    'Login Now',\n                    'Later'\n                ).then(selection => {\n                    if (selection === 'Login Now') {\n                        cloudSync.loginWithBrowser('login');\n                    }\n                });\n            }\n        });\n    }\n\n    // 定期检查 token 状态（每小时检查一次）\n    const tokenCheckInterval = setInterval(async () => {\n        if (cloudSync.isLoggedIn()) {\n            const valid = await cloudSync.validateToken(false);\n            if (!valid) {\n                vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n                    '⚠️ Your cloud sync session has expired. Please login again.',\n                    'Login Now',\n                    'Later'\n                ).then(selection => {\n                    if (selection === 'Login Now') {\n                        cloudSync.loginWithBrowser('login');\n                    }\n                });\n            }\n        }\n    }, 60 * 60 * 1000); // 每小时检查一次\n\n    context.subscriptions.push({ dispose: () => clearInterval(tokenCheckInterval) });\n\n    // 检查云同步状态的函数\n    const checkCloudSyncStatus = async () => {\n        if (cloudSync.isEnabled() && !cloudSync.isLoggedIn()) {\n            // 立即打开登录界面\n            console.log('[CloudSync] Enabled but not logged in, opening login dialog...');\n            \n            // 显示模态提示，强制用户注意\n            const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n            const debugMode = config.get<boolean>('cloudSync.debugMode', false);\n            const message = debugMode \n                ? '⚠️ Cloud sync enabled (Debug Mode). You must login to sync your chat history.'\n                : '⚠️ Cloud sync enabled. You must login to sync your chat history.';\n            \n            vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n                message,\n                { modal: false }, // 不阻塞，但更醒目\n                'Login Now',\n                'Disable Cloud Sync'\n            ).then(async selection => {\n                if (selection === 'Login Now') {\n                    // 使用浏览器OAuth流程\n                    await cloudSync.loginWithBrowser('login');\n                } else if (selection === 'Disable Cloud Sync') {\n                    config.update('cloudSync.enabled', false, true);\n                }\n            });\n            \n            // 同时自动触发浏览器登录\n            cloudSync.loginWithBrowser('login');\n        }\n    };\n\n    // 启动时检查\n    checkCloudSyncStatus();\n\n    // 监听配置变化\n    context.subscriptions.push(\n        vscode.workspace.onDidChangeConfiguration(e => {\n            if (e.affectsConfiguration('chatHistory.cloudSync.enabled')) {\n                checkCloudSyncStatus();\n                automationStatusProvider.refresh();\n                // 上报云同步启用/禁用事件\n                const newConfig = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n                const enabled = newConfig.get<boolean>('cloudSync.enabled', false);\n                telemetry.trackEvent(\n                    enabled ? TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_ENABLED : TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_DISABLED\n                );\n            }\n            if (e.affectsConfiguration('chatHistory.autoSave')) {\n                automationStatusProvider.refresh();\n            }\n            if (e.affectsConfiguration('chatHistory.cloudSync')) {\n                automationStatusProvider.refresh();\n            }\n        })\n    );\n\n    // 导出 telemetry 供其他模块使用\n    (global as any).__telemetryManager = telemetry;\n}\n\n/**\n * 扩展停用时调用\n */\nexport async function deactivate() {\n    console.log('LLM Chat History Extension deactivated');\n\n    // 上报插件停用事件并刷新队列\n    try {\n        const telemetry = (global as any).__telemetryManager as TelemetryManager | undefined;\n        if (telemetry) {\n            await telemetry.trackEventImmediately(TelemetryEvents.EXTENSION_DEACTIVATED);\n            await telemetry.dispose();\n        }\n    } catch (error) {\n        console.error('[Telemetry] Failed to send deactivation event:', error);\n    }\n}\n\n/**\n * 获取 Cursor 数据库路径\n */\nfunction getCursorDatabasePath(): string {\n    const platform = process.platform;\n    const homeDir = process.env.HOME || process.env.USERPROFILE || '';\n    \n    if (platform === 'win32') {\n        return path.join(\n            homeDir,\n            'AppData/Roaming/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\n        );\n    } else if (platform === 'darwin') {\n        return path.join(\n            homeDir,\n            'Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\n        );\n    } else {\n        // Linux\n        return path.join(\n            homeDir,\n            '.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\n        );\n    }\n}\n\n\n"
}
```

</details>
</details>

Download the `.vsix` file from releases\n2. In VS Code, go to Extensions view\n3. Click the `...` menu and select \"Install from VSIX...\"\n4. Select the downloaded file\n\n## Usage\n\nThe extension activates automatically when you open a workspace in VS Code or Cursor IDE.\n\n### Automatic Saving\n\nBy default, the extension automatically monitors your LLM chat history and saves it to `.llm-chat-history/history/` in your workspace root.\n\n### Manual Save\n\nYou can manually trigger a save by:\n1. Opening the Command Palette (Ctrl+Shift+P / Cmd+Shift+P)\n2. Running the command: \"LLMChatHistory: Save Chat History Now\"\n\n### Search Chat History\n\nYou can search through all your saved conversations:\n1. Opening the Command Palette (Ctrl+Shift+P / Cmd+Shift+P)\n2. Running the command: \"LLMChatHistory: Search Chat History\"\n3. Enter your search keywords\n4. Select from the matching conversations found\n5. The file will open with the first match highlighted\n\n### ☁️ Cloud Sync (Optional)\n\n**NEW in v0.3.0!** Sync your chat history to the cloud:\n\n#### Quick Start\n1. Enable cloud sync: `chatHistory.cloudSync.enabled = true`\n2. Click the cloud icon in status bar to login/register\n3. Your chat history will automatically sync to the cloud!\n\n#### Commands\n- `LLMChatHistory: Login to Cloud` - Login or register an account\n- `LLMChatHistory: Logout from Cloud` - Logout from cloud\n- `LLMChatHistory: Sync to Cloud Now` - Manually sync now\n\n#### Features\n- 🔐 **Secure**: End-to-end encrypted sync\n- 🔄 **Auto Sync**: Automatically syncs new conversations\n- 📱 **Cross-Device**: Access your history from anywhere\n- 🌍 **Multi-Language**: Full i18n support (EN/ZH)\n\n#### For Developers (Debug Mode)\nIf you're developing or testing locally:\n1. Enable debug mode: `chatHistory.cloudSync.debugMode = true`\n2. Set your local server: `chatHistory.cloudSync.debugServerUrl = \"http://192.168.56.101:9999\"`\n3. The extension will use your custom server instead of the official one\n\n### Viewing History\n\nThe generated Markdown files are optimized for direct viewing:\n\n- **VS Code**: Open `.md` files directly with full Markdown preview support\n- **GitHub**: View with rich formatting and collapsible sections\n- **Obsidian/Notion**: Import for knowledge management\n- **Any Markdown Editor**: Standard Markdown with enhanced readability\n\n## ⚙️ Configuration (Optional)\n\n**Good news: This extension works out-of-the-box with zero configuration!** 🎉\n\nBut if you want to customize it, here are the available settings:\n\n### Quick Settings Access\n1. Open VS Code Command Palette (`Ctrl+Shift+P`)\n2. Type \"Preferences: Open Settings (UI)\"\n3. Search for \"chatHistory\"\n\n### Available Settings\n\n| Setting | Default | Description |\n|---------|---------|-------------|\n| `chatHistory.autoSave` | `true` | ✅ Enable automatic saving of chat history |\n| `chatHistory.outputDirectory` | `.llm-chat-history/history` | 📁 Where to save your chat files |\n| `chatHistory.useUTC` | `true` | 🕐 Use UTC timezone for consistent timestamps |\n| `chatHistory.locale` | `auto` | 🌍 Language: `auto`, `en`, or `zh` |\n| `chatHistory.cloudSync.enabled` | `false` | ☁️ Enable cloud sync |\n| `chatHistory.cloudSync.autoSync` | `true` | 🔄 Auto sync to cloud when logged in |\n| `chatHistory.cloudSync.debugMode` | `false` | 🐛 Debug mode (for development only) |\n| `chatHistory.cloudSync.debugServerUrl` | `http://192.168.56.101:9999` | 🔧 Custom server URL (debug mode only) |\n\n### 💡 Pro Tips\n\n- **Keep defaults** for most users - everything works perfectly!\n- **Change output directory** if you prefer a different location\n- **Use UTC** if you work with international teams\n- **Auto locale** adapts to your VS Code language setting\n\n## Output Format\n\nConversations are saved as beautifully formatted Markdown files:\n\n```markdown\n# Conversation Title\n\n**Created**: 2025-12-23 10:30Z\n**Messages**: 4 (User: 2, Assistant: 2)\n**Session ID**: `abc-123`\n\n---\n\n## 💬 User #1\n\n_2025-12-23 10:30Z_\n\nUser's question here\n\n---\n\n## 🤖 Assistant #1 (claude-4.5-sonnet, Agent)\n\n_2025-12-23 10:31Z_\n\n<details>\n<summary><strong>💭 Thinking Process</strong></summary>\n\n> AI's internal thinking process\n> appears as a blockquote for easy reading\n\n</details>\n\nAI's response here\n\n**🔧 Tool Uses** (2)\n\n<details>\n<summary>🔍 **grep** — Grep for \"pattern\" in \"path\" • 5 matches</summary>\n\n**Args**\n\n```json\n{\n  \"pattern\": \"search term\",\n  \"path\": \"src/\"\n}\n```\n\n**Result**\n\n```json\n{\n  \"matches\": 5\n}\n```\n\n</details>\n\n---\n```\n\n### Key Features\n\n- ✨ **Clear Structure**: Hierarchical headings with emoji indicators\n- 📊 **Metadata**: Session info, message counts, timestamps\n- 💭 **Collapsible Sections**: Thinking processes and tool results fold away\n- 🎨 **Icon System**: Visual indicators for users (💬), assistants (🤖), tools (🔧), etc.\n- 📝 **Readable**: Optimized for direct viewing in any Markdown renderer\n- 🌐 **Bilingual**: All labels automatically localized to English or Chinese\n\n### File Naming\n\nFiles are named with the pattern: `YYYY-MM-DD_HH-MMZ-{title}.md`\n\nExample: `2025-12-23_10-30Z-implementing-chat-history.md`\n\n## System Requirements\n\n### ✅ Tested Environments\n- **OS**: Windows 10/11 (fully tested)\n- **Applications**: Cursor IDE, VS Code with Cline/Kilo/Blackbox AI extensions\n- **VS Code Version**: 1.93.0 or higher\n\n### ❓ Untested (May Work)\n- macOS\n- Linux\n- Other AI coding assistants\n\n### Prerequisites\n- At least one supported AI assistant installed (Cursor, Cline, Kilo, or Blackbox AI)\n- Workspace folder must be open\n\n\n## Known Issues\n\n- The extension requires a workspace to be open\n- Some AI assistants may store data in cloud services rather than local files\n- Native module installation is handled automatically on Windows\n\n### NODE_MODULE_VERSION Errors\n\nIf you encounter errors like:\n\n```\nError: The module 'better_sqlite3.node' was compiled against a different Node.js version\nusing NODE_MODULE_VERSION 127. Opening the Command Palette (Ctrl+Shift+P / Cmd+Shift+P)\n2. Running the command: \"LLMChatHistory: Save Chat History Now\"\n\n### Search Chat History\n\nYou can search through all your saved conversations:\n1. Opening the Command Palette (Ctrl+Shift+P / Cmd+Shift+P)\n2. Running the command: \"LLMChatHistory: Search Chat History\"\n3. Enter your search keywords\n4. Select from the matching conversations found\n5. The file will open with the first match highlighted\n\n### ☁️ Cloud Sync (Optional)\n\n**NEW in v0.3.0!** Sync your chat history to the cloud:\n\n#### Quick Start\n1. Enable cloud sync: `chatHistory.cloudSync.enabled = true`\n2. Click the cloud icon in status bar to login/register\n3. Your chat history will automatically sync to the cloud!\n\n#### Commands\n- `LLMChatHistory: Login to Cloud` - Login or register an account\n- `LLMChatHistory: Logout from Cloud` - Logout from cloud\n- `LLMChatHistory: Sync to Cloud Now` - Manually sync now\n\n#### Features\n- 🔐 **Secure**: End-to-end encrypted sync\n- 🔄 **Auto Sync**: Automatically syncs new conversations\n- 📱 **Cross-Device**: Access your history from anywhere\n- 🌍 **Multi-Language**: Full i18n support (EN/ZH)\n\n#### For Developers (Debug Mode)\nIf you're developing or testing locally:\n1. Enable debug mode: `chatHistory.cloudSync.debugMode = true`\n2. Set your local server: `chatHistory.cloudSync.debugServerUrl = \"http://192.168.56.101:9999\"`\n3. The extension will use your custom server instead of the official one\n\n### Viewing History\n\nThe generated Markdown files are optimized for direct viewing:\n\n- **VS Code**: Open `.md` files directly with full Markdown preview support\n- **GitHub**: View with rich formatting and collapsible sections\n- **Obsidian/Notion**: Import for knowledge management\n- **Any Markdown Editor**: Standard Markdown with enhanced readability\n\n## ⚙️ Configuration (Optional)\n\n**Good news: This extension works out-of-the-box with zero configuration!** 🎉\n\nBut if you want to customize it, here are the available settings:\n\n### Quick Settings Access\n1. Open VS Code Command Palette (`Ctrl+Shift+P`)\n2. Type \"Preferences: Open Settings (UI)\"\n3. Search for \"chatHistory\"\n\n### Available Settings\n\n| Setting | Default | Description |\n|---------|---------|-------------|\n| `chatHistory.autoSave` | `true` | ✅ Enable automatic saving of chat history |\n| `chatHistory.outputDirectory` | `.llm-chat-history/history` | 📁 Where to save your chat files |\n| `chatHistory.useUTC` | `true` | 🕐 Use UTC timezone for consistent timestamps |\n| `chatHistory.locale` | `auto` | 🌍 Language: `auto`, `en`, or `zh` |\n| `chatHistory.cloudSync.enabled` | `false` | ☁️ Enable cloud sync |\n| `chatHistory.cloudSync.autoSync` | `true` | 🔄 Auto sync to cloud when logged in |\n| `chatHistory.cloudSync.debugMode` | `false` | 🐛 Debug mode (for development only) |\n| `chatHistory.cloudSync.debugServerUrl` | `http://192.168.56.101:9999` | 🔧 Custom server URL (debug mode only) |\n\n### 💡 Pro Tips\n\n- **Keep defaults** for most users - everything works perfectly!\n- **Change output directory** if you prefer a different location\n- **Use UTC** if you Cline/Kilo/Blackbox AI extensions\n- **VS Code Version**: 1.93.0 or higher\n\n### ❓ Untested (May Work)\n- macOS\n- Linux\n- Other AI coding assistants\n\n### Prerequisites\n- At least one supported No configuration needed!\n3. **Start chatting** with your AI assistants\n4. **Watch your conversations** automatically save to `.llm-chat-history/`\n\n### Supported IDEs\n- ✅ **Cursor IDE** (primary target)\n- ✅ **VS Code** with AI extensions\n- ✅ **Codium**, **VSCodium** (compatible)\n\n### ⚡ What Happens After Install?\n- 🔍 **Auto-Detection**: Finds all available AI assistants\n- 📁 **Auto-Creation**: Creates `.llm-chat-history/` folder in your workspace\n- ⏰ **Auto-Monitoring**: Starts watching for new conversations (every 30 seconds)\n- 🎯 **Smart Filtering**: Only saves relevant conversations\n\n> **Note**: This extension uses `better-sqlite3`, a native module. The installation script automatically handles downloading the correct prebuilt binaries for Electron. If you encounter installation issues, run `npm run setup` manually.\n\n### From VSIX\n\n1. Download the `.vsix` file from releases\n2. In VS Code, go to Extensions view\n3. Click the `...` menu and select \"Install from VSIX...\"\n4. Select the downloaded file\n\n## Usage\n\nThe extension activates automatically when you open a workspace in VS Code or Cursor IDE.\n\n### Automatic Saving\n\nBy default, the extension automatically monitors your LLM chat history and saves it to `.llm-chat-history/history/` in your workspace root.\n\n### Manual Save\n\nYou can manually trigger a save by:\n1. Opening the Command Palette (Ctrl+Shift+P / Cmd+Shift+P)\n2. Running the command: \"LLMChatHistory: Save Chat History Now\"\n\n### Search Chat History\n\nYou can search through all your saved conversations:\n1. Opening the Command Palette (Ctrl+Shift+P / Cmd+Shift+P)\n2. Running the command: \"LLMChatHistory: Search Chat History\"\n3. Enter your search keywords\n4. Select from the matching conversations found\n5. The file will open with the first match highlighted\n\n### ☁️ Cloud Sync (Optional)\n\n**NEW in v0.3.0!** Sync your chat history to the cloud:\n\n#### Quick Start\n1. Enable cloud sync: `chatHistory.cloudSync.enabled = true`\n2. Click the cloud icon in status bar to login/register\n3. Your chat history will automatically sync to the cloud!\n\n#### Commands\n- `LLMChatHistory: Login to Cloud` - Login or register an account\n- `LLMChatHistory: Logout from Cloud` - Logout from cloud\n- `LLMChatHistory: Sync to Cloud Now` - Manually sync now\n\n#### Features\n- 🔐 **Secure**: End-to-end encrypted sync\n- 🔄 **Auto Sync**: Automatically syncs new conversations\n- 📱 **Cross-Device**: Access your history from anywhere\n- 🌍 **Multi-Language**: Full i18n support (EN/ZH)\n\n#### For Developers (Debug Mode)\nIf you're developing or testing locally:\n1. Enable debug mode: `chatHistory.cloudSync.debugMode = true`\n2. Set your local server: `chatHistory.cloudSync.debugServerUrl = \"http://192.168.56.101:9999\"`\n3. The extension will use your custom server instead of the official one\n\n### Viewing History\n\nThe generated Markdown files are optimized for direct viewing:\n\n- **VS Code**: Open `.md` files directly with full Markdown preview support\n- **GitHub**: View with rich formatting and collapsible sections\n- **Obsidian/Notion**: Import for knowledge management\n- **Any Markdown Editor**: Standard Markdown with enhanced readability\n\n## ⚙️ Configuration (Optional)\n\n**Good news: This extension works out-of-the-box with zero configuration!** 🎉\n\nBut if you want to customize it, here are the available settings:\n\n### Quick Settings Access\n1. Open VS Code Command Palette (`Ctrl+Shift+P`)\n2. Type \"Preferences: Open Settings (UI)\"\n3. Search for \"chatHistory\"\n\n### Available Settings\n\n| Setting | Default | Description |\n|---------|---------|-------------|\n| `chatHistory.autoSave` | `true` | ✅ Enable automatic saving of chat history |\n| `chatHistory.outputDirectory` | `.llm-chat-history/history` | 📁 Where to save your chat files |\n| `chatHistory.useUTC` | `true` | 🕐 Use UTC timezone for consistent timestamps |\n| `chatHistory.locale` | `auto` | 🌍 Language: `auto`, `en`, or `zh` |\n| `chatHistory.cloudSync.enabled` | `false` | ☁️ Enable cloud sync |\n| `chatHistory.cloudSync.autoSync` | `true` | 🔄 Auto sync to cloud when logged in |\n| `chatHistory.cloudSync.debugMode` | `false` | 🐛 Debug mode (for development only) |\n| `chatHistory.cloudSync.debugServerUrl` | `http://192.168.56.101:9999` | 🔧 Custom server URL (debug mode only) |\n\n### 💡 Pro Tips\n\n- **Keep defaults** for most users - everything works perfectly!\n- **Change output directory** if you prefer a different location\n- **Use UTC** if you work with international teams\n- **Auto locale** adapts to your VS Code language setting\n\n## Output Format\n\nConversations are saved as beautifully formatted Markdown files:\n\n```markdown\n# Conversation Title\n\n**Created**: 2025-12-23 10:30Z\n**Messages**: 4 (User: 2, Assistant: 2)\n**Session ID**: `abc-123`\n\n---\n\n## 💬 User #1\n\n_2025-12-23 10:30Z_\n\nUser's question here\n\n---\n\n## 🤖 Assistant #1 (claude-4.5-sonnet, Agent)\n\n_2025-12-23 10:31Z_\n\n<details>\n<summary><strong>💭 Thinking Process</strong></summary>\n\n> AI's internal thinking process\n> appears as a blockquote for easy reading\n\n</details>\n\nAI's response here\n\n**🔧 Tool Uses** (2)\n\n<details>\n<summary>🔍 **grep** — Grep for \"pattern\" in \"path\" • 5 matches</summary>\n\n**Args**\n\n```json\n{\n  \"pattern\": \"search term\",\n  \"path\": \"src/\"\n}\n```\n\n**Result**\n\n```json\n{\n  \"matches\": 5\n}\n```\n\n</details>\n\n---\n```\n\n### Key Features\n\n- ✨ **Clear Structure**: Hierarchical headings with emoji indicators\n- 📊 **Metadata**: Session info, message counts, timestamps\n- 💭 **Collapsible Sections**: Thinking processes and tool results fold away\n- 🎨 **Icon System**: Visual indicators for users (💬), assistants (🤖), tools (🔧), etc.\n- 📝 **Readable**: Optimized for direct viewing in any Markdown renderer\n- 🌐 **Bilingual**: All labels automatically localized to English or Chinese\n\n### File Naming\n\nFiles are named with the pattern: `YYYY-MM-DD_HH-MMZ-{title}.md`\n\nExample: `2025-12-23_10-30Z-implementing-chat-history.md`\n\n## System Requirements\n\n### ✅ Tested Environments\n- **OS**: Windows 10/11 (fully tested)\n- **Applications**: Cursor IDE, VS Code with Cline/Kilo/Blackbox AI extensions\n- **VS Code Version**: 1.93.0 or higher\n\n### ❓ Untested (May Work)\n- macOS\n- Linux\n- Other AI coding assistants\n\n### Prerequisites\n- At least one supported AI assistant installed:\n  - **Cursor IDE** - [Download](https://cursor.sh/)\n  - **Cline** (VS Code Extension) - [Install from Marketplace](https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=saoudrizwan.claude-dev)\n  - **Kilo** (VS Code Extension) - [Install from Marketplace](https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=kilocode.kilo-code)\n  - **Blackbox AI** (VS Code Extension) - [Install from Marketplace](https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=Blackboxapp.blackbox)\n- Workspace folder must be open\n\n\n## Known Issues\n\n- The extension requires a workspace to be open\n- Some AI assistants may store data in cloud services rather than local files\n- Native module installation is handled automatically on Windows\n\n### NODE_MODULE_VERSION Errors\n\nIf you encounter errors like:\n\n```\nError: The module 'better_sqlite3.node' was compiled against a different Node.js version\nusing NODE_MODULE_VERSION 127. This version requires NODE_MODULE_VERSION 136.\n```\n\n**Quick Fix**:\n\n```bash\nnpm run setup\nnpm run verify\n```\n\nThen restart Cursor/VS Code completely.\n\n**Why does this happen?**\n- VS Code/Cursor runs on Electron (which includes its own Node.js version)\n- Native modules must be compiled for the specific Electron version\n- Your system Node.js version is different from Electron's version\n\n**For detailed explanation and solutions**:\n- 📖 See `开发者完全指南.md` - Complete developer guide\n- 📖 See `QUICK_FIX.md` - Quick reference\n- 🔧 Run `npm run fix` for interactive troubleshooting\n\n## Roadmap\n\nWe are continuously improving this extension.\n\n### ✅ Recently Added\n- 🔍 **Full-Text Search**: Instantly search through all your saved conversations (v0.2.8)\n- ☁️ **Cloud Sync**: Sync your chat history to your own server (v0.3.0)\n\n### 🚀 Coming Soon\n- 👥 **Team Collaboration**: Share and collaborate on conversations\n- 📊 **Advanced Analytics**: Insights and statistics about your AI usage\n- 🏷️ **Tags & Organization**: Better ways to organize your history\n- 📤 **Export Options**: PDF, HTML, and more export formats\n\n## Pricing\n\n### Free Version (Current)\n- ✅ Unlimited local chat history saving\n- ✅ Markdown export\n- ✅ Multi-language support\n- ✅ Auto-save functionality\n\n### Pro Version (Coming Soon)\n- 👥 Team collaboration features\n- 📊 Advanced analytics\n- 🎯 Priority support\n- 🔄 Advanced cloud features\n\nStay tuned for updates!\n\n## License\n\nThis software is proprietary and confidential. Cursor IDE (AI-first code editor based on VS Code)\n  - VS Code with AI extensions (Cline, Kilo, Blackbox AI)\n- **VS Code Version**: 1.93.0 or higher\n\n### ❓ Untested (May Work)\n- macOS\n- Linux\n- Other AI coding assistants\n\n### Prerequisites\n- At least one supported AI assistant installed:\n  - **Cursor IDE** - [Download](https://cursor.sh/)\n  - **Cline** (VS Code Extension) - [Install from Marketplace](https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=saoudrizwan.claude-dev)\n  - **Kilo** (VS Code Extension) - [Install from Marketplace](https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=kilocode.kilo-code)\n  - **Blackbox AI** (VS Code Extension) - [Install from Marketplace](https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=Blackboxapp.blackbox)\n- Workspace folder must be open\n\n\n## Known Issues\n\n- The extension requires a workspace to be open\n- Some AI assistants may store data in cloud services rather than local files\n- Native module installation is handled automatically on Windows\n\n### NODE_MODULE_VERSION Errors\n\nIf you encounter errors like:\n\n```\nError: The module 'better_sqlite3.node' was compiled against a different Node.js version\nusing NODE_MODULE_VERSION 127. This version requires NODE_MODULE_VERSION 136.\n```\n\n**Quick Fix**:\n\n```bash\nnpm run setup\nnpm run verify\n```\n\nThen restart Cursor/VS Code completely.\n\n**Why does this happen?**\n- VS Code/Cursor runs on Electron (which includes its own Node.js version)\n- Native modules must be compiled for the specific Electron version\n- Your system Node.js version is different from Electron's version\n\n**For detailed explanation and solutions**:\n- 📖 See `开发者完全指南.md` - Complete developer guide\n- 📖 See `QUICK_FIX.md` - Quick reference\n- 🔧 Run `npm run fix` for interactive troubleshooting\n\n## Roadmap\n\nWe are continuously improving this extension.\n\n### ✅ Recently Added\n- 🔍 **Full-Text Search**: Instantly search through all your saved conversations (v0.2.8)\n- ☁️ **Cloud Sync**: Sync your chat history to your own server (v0.3.0)\n\n### 🚀 Coming Soon\n- 👥 **Team Collaboration**: Share and collaborate on conversations\n- 📊 **Advanced Analytics**: Insights and statistics about your AI usage\n- 🏷️ **Tags & Organization**: Better ways to organize your history\n- 📤 **Export Options**: PDF, HTML, and more export formats\n\n## Pricing\n\n### Free Version (Current)\n- ✅ Unlimited local chat history saving\n- ✅ Markdown export\n- ✅ Multi-language support\n- ✅ Auto-save functionality\n\n### Pro Version (Coming Soon)\n- 👥 Team collaboration features\n- 📊 Advanced analytics\n- 🎯 Priority support\n- 🔄 Advanced cloud features\n\nStay tuned for updates!\n\n## License\n\nThis software is proprietary and confidential. Select the downloaded file\n\n## Usage\n\nThe extension activates automatically when you open a workspace in VS Code or Cursor IDE.\n\n### Automatic Saving\n\nBy default, the extension automatically monitors your LLM chat history and saves it to `.llm-chat-history/history/` in your workspace root.\n\n### Manual Save\n\nYou can manually trigger a save by:\n1. Opening the Command Palette (Ctrl+Shift+P / Cmd+Shift+P)\n2. Running the command: \"LLMChatHistory: Save Chat History Now\"\n\n### Search Chat History\n\nYou can search through all your saved conversations:\n1. Opening the Command Palette (Ctrl+Shift+P / Cmd+Shift+P)\n2. Running the command: \"LLMChatHistory: Search Chat History\"\n3. Enter your search keywords\n4. Select from the matching conversations found\n5. The file will open with the first match highlighted\n\n### ☁️ Cloud Sync (Optional)\n\n**NEW in v0.3.0!** Sync your chat history to the cloud:\n\n#### Quick Start\n1. Enable cloud sync: `chatHistory.cloudSync.enabled = true`\n2. Click the cloud icon in status bar to login/register\n3. Your chat history will automatically sync to the cloud!\n\n#### Commands\n- `LLMChatHistory: Login to Cloud` - Login or register an account\n- `LLMChatHistory: Logout from Cloud` - Logout from cloud\n- `LLMChatHistory: Sync to Cloud Now` - Manually sync now\n\n#### Features\n- 🔐 **Secure**: End-to-end encrypted sync\n- 🔄 **Auto Sync**: Automatically syncs new conversations\n- 📱 **Cross-Device**: Access your history from anywhere\n- 🌍 **Multi-Language**: Full i18n support (EN/ZH)\n\n#### For Developers (Debug Mode)\nIf you're developing or testing locally:\n1. Enable debug mode: `chatHistory.cloudSync.debugMode = true`\n2. Set your local server: `chatHistory.cloudSync.debugServerUrl = \"http://192.168.56.101:9999\"`\n3. The extension will use your custom server instead of the official one\n\n### Viewing History\n\nThe generated Markdown files are optimized for direct viewing:\n\n- **VS Code**: Open `.md` files directly with full Markdown preview support\n- **GitHub**: View with rich formatting and collapsible sections\n- **Obsidian/Notion**: Import for knowledge management\n- **Any Markdown Editor**: Standard Markdown with enhanced readability\n\n## ⚙️ Configuration (Optional)\n\n**Good news: This extension works out-of-the-box with zero configuration!** 🎉\n\nBut if you want to customize it, here are the available settings:\n\n### Quick Settings Access\n1. Open VS Code Command Palette (`Ctrl+Shift+P`)\n2. Type \"Preferences: Open Settings (UI)\"\n3. Search for \"chatHistory\"\n\n### Available Settings\n\n| Setting | Default | Description |\n|---------|---------|-------------|\n| `chatHistory.autoSave` | `true` | ✅ Enable automatic saving of chat history |\n| `chatHistory.outputDirectory` | `.llm-chat-history/history` | 📁 Where to save your chat files |\n| `chatHistory.useUTC` | `true` | 🕐 Use UTC timezone for consistent timestamps |\n| `chatHistory.locale` | `auto` | 🌍 Language: `auto`, `en`, or `zh` |\n| `chatHistory.cloudSync.enabled` | `false` | ☁️ Enable cloud sync |\n| `chatHistory.cloudSync.autoSync` | `true` | 🔄 Auto sync to cloud when logged in |\n| `chatHistory.cloudSync.debugMode` | `false` | 🐛 Debug mode (for development only) |\n| `chatHistory.cloudSync.debugServerUrl` | `http://192.168.56.101:9999` | 🔧 Custom server URL (debug mode only) |\n\n### 💡 Pro Tips\n\n- **Keep defaults** for most users - everything works perfectly!\n- **Change output directory** if you prefer a different location\n- **Use UTC** if you work with international teams\n- **Auto locale** adapts to your VS Code language setting\n\n## Output Format\n\nConversations are saved as beautifully formatted Markdown files:\n\n```markdown\n# Conversation Title\n\n**Created**: 2025-12-23 10:30Z\n**Messages**: 4 (User: 2, Assistant: 2)\n**Session ID**: `abc-123`\n\n---\n\n## 💬 User #1\n\n_2025-12-23 10:30Z_\n\nUser's question here\n\n---\n\n## 🤖 Assistant #1 (claude-4.5-sonnet, Agent)\n\n_2025-12-23 10:31Z_\n\n<details>\n<summary><strong>💭 Thinking Process</strong></summary>\n\n> AI's internal thinking process\n> appears as a blockquote for easy reading\n\n</details>\n\nAI's response here\n\n**🔧 Tool Uses** (2)\n\n<details>\n<summary>🔍 **grep** — Grep for \"pattern\" in \"path\" • 5 matches</summary>\n\n**Args**\n\n```json\n{\n  \"pattern\": \"search term\",\n  \"path\": \"src/\"\n}\n```\n\n**Result**\n\n```json\n{\n  \"matches\": 5\n}\n```\n\n</details>\n\n---\n```\n\n### Key Features\n\n- ✨ **Clear Structure**: Hierarchical headings with emoji indicators\n- 📊 **Metadata**: Session info, message counts, timestamps\n- 💭 **Collapsible Sections**: Thinking processes and tool results fold away\n- 🎨 **Icon System**: Visual indicators for users (💬), assistants (🤖), tools (🔧), etc.\n- 📝 **Readable**: Optimized for direct viewing in any Markdown renderer\n- 🌐 **Bilingual**: All labels automatically localized to English or Chinese\n\n### File Naming\n\nFiles are named with the pattern: `YYYY-MM-DD_HH-MMZ-{title}.md`\n\nExample: `2025-12-23_10-30Z-implementing-chat-history.md`\n\n## System Requirements\n\n### ✅ Tested Environments\n- **OS**: Windows 10/11 (fully tested)\n- **IDE/Editor**: \n  - Cursor IDE (AI-first code editor based on VS Code)\n  - VS Code with AI extensions (Cline, Kilo, Blackbox AI)\n- **VS Code Version**: 1.93.0 or higher\n\n### ❓ Untested (May Work)\n- macOS\n- Linux\n- Other AI coding assistants\n\n### Prerequisites\n- At least one supported AI assistant installed:\n  - **Cursor IDE** - [Download](https://cursor.sh/)\n  - **Cline** (VS Code Extension) - [Install from Marketplace](https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=saoudrizwan.claude-dev)\n  - **Kilo** (VS Code Extension) - This version requires NODE_MODULE_VERSION 136.\n```\n\n**Quick Fix**:\n\n```bash\nnpm run setup\nnpm run verify\n```\n\nThen restart Cursor/VS Code completely.\n\n**Why does this happen?**\n- VS Code/Cursor runs on Electron (which includes its own Node.js version)\n- Native modules must be compiled for the specific Electron version\n- Your system Node.js version is different from Electron's version\n\n**For detailed explanation and solutions**:\n- 📖 See `开发者完全指南.md` - Complete developer guide\n- 📖 See `QUICK_FIX.md` - Quick reference\n- 🔧 Run `npm run fix` for interactive troubleshooting\n\n## Roadmap\n\nWe are continuously improving this extension.\n\n### ✅ Recently Added\n- 🔍 **Full-Text Search**: Instantly search through all your saved conversations (v0.2.8)\n- ☁️ **Cloud Sync**: Sync your chat history to your own server (v0.3.0)\n\n### 🚀 Coming Soon\n- 👥 **Team Collaboration**: Share and collaborate on conversations\n- 📊 **Advanced Analytics**: Insights and statistics about your AI usage\n- 🏷️ **Tags & Organization**: Better ways to organize your history\n- 📤 **Export Options**: PDF, HTML, and more export formats\n\n## Pricing\n\n### Free Version (Current)\n- ✅ Unlimited local chat history saving\n- ✅ Markdown export\n- ✅ Multi-language support\n- ✅ Auto-save functionality\n\n### Pro Version (Coming Soon)\n- 👥 Team collaboration features\n- 📊 Advanced analytics\n- 🎯 Priority support\n- 🔄 Advanced cloud features\n\nStay tuned for updates!\n\n## License\n\nThis software is proprietary and confidential.
